---
name: Rule request
about: Suggest a useful-action rule for UGT activity mining
title: "[Rule] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Activity type

Describe the game, marketplace, NFT, developer, quest, or community action.

## Why is it useful?

Explain why this is a real ecosystem contribution instead of empty engagement.

## Example event

```json
{
  "eventId": "evt-demo",
  "type": "partner_quest_completed",
  "ruleId": "partner-demo",
  "occurredAt": "2026-05-01T10:00:00.000Z",
  "source": "partner",
  "confidence": 0.9
}
```

## Risk boundary

Confirm the rule does not promise token value, income, allocation, yield, or guaranteed reward.
